_meta.purpose: Registry that drives every property site from one template. Add an entry here + drop photos in the listing's asset folder, and the generator stamps out listings/<slug>.html in the 1330 design.
_meta.asset_convention: Final web images live IN the deploy repo at listings/<slug>/ (hero.jpg, 02.jpg..NN.jpg, og.jpg). Source print/edited files stay in 08_Listings/<address>/Photos/Edited/Web/ and are web-optimized into the repo by the build step. Never reference ../../08_Listings from a deployed page — it 404s in production.

listings.headline: A stone manor on a private cul-de-sac.
listings.title: 1330 W. Whitmore Court · Lake Forest · Milhaupt · Jakaitis
listings.addr_line: 1330 W. Whitmore Court · Lake Forest, Illinois 60045
listings.meta_desc: 1330 W. Whitmore Court — a stately stone manor on a private cul-de-sac in Lake Forest, Illinois. Listed at $3,250,000 by Patrick Milhaupt of Jameson Sotheby's International Realty.
listings.og_desc: A stately stone manor on a private cul-de-sac in Lake Forest — 5 bedrooms, 5.5 baths, 7,200 sq ft on 1.2 acres. Presented by Patrick Milhaupt, Jameson Sotheby's International Realty.

listings._todo: Source folder exists at 08_Listings/28 Aberdeen Court, Bannockburn, IL. Needs: price + specs + web photos. Then run the generator.

_sold_note: Sold listings can be auto-seeded from Supabase raw_sales (price, beds, baths, sqft, close_date, address) — data-driven pages. They render best once each has photos in its listings/<slug>/ folder; until then they show specs + market context.
